events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! His unique drumming style helped define the sound of The Beatles and influenced countless musicians. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God & Star Gazer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the incredible Brian May! From Queen's stadium-rocking anthems to his work as an astrophysicist, he truly is a man of many talents.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger, whose stage presence remains unmatched. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first video ever played.

angles.name: The Video Revolution
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed the music industry forever! The Buggles famously kicked it off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star.' Did it, though?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music. What's your favourite track from this absolute Britpop essential?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music', kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for Woodstock, a defining moment of peace and music. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: On this day in 1977, the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. His music and influence continue to resonate, cementing his place as the King of Rock and Roll.

events.title: Tupac Shakur shot in Las Vegas 30 years ago
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas, tragically passing away six days later.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the hip-hop world was shaken when Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas. His legacy and impact on music are still felt profoundly today.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: On this day in 1970, the world mourned the loss of guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970. His innovative guitar work continues to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that legendary crosswalk cover, was released on this day in the UK in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and one of the most famous album covers in history. Which track from the album is on repeat for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll icon with a voice that commands attention. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: King of Swagger
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Love him or loathe him, you can't deny his rock and roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released as a US single on this day in 1971.

angles.name: A Message of Peace
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine', a song that continues to inspire and resonate with its powerful message of peace. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: The revolutionary Apple iPod, which transformed how we listen to music, was first released on this day in 2001.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple launched a device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music listening forever. What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on this day in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007, first hitting screens on this day in 1962. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the best theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering a Visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire the world.
